<span id="cb23-284"><a href="#cb23-284" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-285"><a href="#cb23-285" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Check sample sizes of each state</span></span>
<span id="cb23-286"><a href="#cb23-286" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sample_cutoff <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> ces2020_substantive <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-287"><a href="#cb23-287" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">group_by</span>(state_fips) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-288"><a href="#cb23-288" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">summarise</span>(<span class="at">n =</span> <span class="fu">n</span>()) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-289"><a href="#cb23-289" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-290"><a href="#cb23-290" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># only give me states with less than 200 responses</span></span>
<span id="cb23-291"><a href="#cb23-291" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">filter</span>(n <span class="sc">&lt;</span> <span class="dv">200</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-292"><a href="#cb23-292" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-293"><a href="#cb23-293" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sample_cutoff</span>
<span id="cb23-294"><a href="#cb23-294" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-295"><a href="#cb23-295" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>survey <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">svydesign</span>(<span class="at">ids =</span> <span class="sc">~</span><span class="dv">0</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-296"><a href="#cb23-296" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="at">data =</span> ces2020_substantive, </span>
<span id="cb23-297"><a href="#cb23-297" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="at">weights =</span> <span class="sc">~</span>commonpostweight)</span>
<span id="cb23-298"><a href="#cb23-298" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-299"><a href="#cb23-299" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_state <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">as.data.frame</span>(<span class="fu">svyby</span>(<span class="sc">~</span>contact, </span>
<span id="cb23-300"><a href="#cb23-300" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     <span class="sc">~</span>state_fips, </span>
<span id="cb23-301"><a href="#cb23-301" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     survey, </span>
<span id="cb23-302"><a href="#cb23-302" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     svymean, </span>
<span id="cb23-303"><a href="#cb23-303" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                     <span class="at">na.rm =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>)) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-304"><a href="#cb23-304" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-305"><a href="#cb23-305" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I&#39;m telling R to select all state_fips that were not in our</span></span>
<span id="cb23-306"><a href="#cb23-306" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># table of states with less than &lt;200 entries!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-307"><a href="#cb23-307" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">filter</span>(<span class="sc">!</span>(state_fips <span class="sc">%in%</span> sample_cutoff<span class="sc">$</span>state_fips))</span>
<span id="cb23-308"><a href="#cb23-308" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-309"><a href="#cb23-309" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Join with urbnmapr</span></span>
<span id="cb23-310"><a href="#cb23-310" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_map <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">left_join</span>(contact_state, </span>
<span id="cb23-311"><a href="#cb23-311" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                         states, <span class="at">by =</span> <span class="st">&quot;state_fips&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-312"><a href="#cb23-312" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-313"><a href="#cb23-313" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-314"><a href="#cb23-314" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Spoiler! This step will let us make a tile map later on. We&#39;re specifying the dimensions of the </span></span>
<span id="cb23-315"><a href="#cb23-315" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># tile here. I want my tiles to be square, but you can change this as you see fit.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-316"><a href="#cb23-316" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">mutate</span>(<span class="at">xdimension =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-317"><a href="#cb23-317" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         <span class="at">ydimension =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>) </span>
<span id="cb23-318"><a href="#cb23-318" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">ggplot</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-319"><a href="#cb23-319" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># County map</span></span>
<span id="cb23-320"><a href="#cb23-320" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> contact_map,</span>
<span id="cb23-321"><a href="#cb23-321" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> long, <span class="at">y =</span> lat,</span>
<span id="cb23-322"><a href="#cb23-322" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">group =</span> group,</span>
<span id="cb23-323"><a href="#cb23-323" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             </span>
<span id="cb23-324"><a href="#cb23-324" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="co"># our variable of interest!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-325"><a href="#cb23-325" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                             <span class="at">fill =</span> contact)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-326"><a href="#cb23-326" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Add state outlines</span></span>
<span id="cb23-327"><a href="#cb23-327" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_polygon</span>(<span class="at">data =</span> urbnmapr<span class="sc">::</span>states,</span>
<span id="cb23-328"><a href="#cb23-328" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">mapping =</span> <span class="fu">aes</span>(long, lat,<span class="at">group =</span> group),</span>
<span id="cb23-329"><a href="#cb23-329" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               </span>
<span id="cb23-330"><a href="#cb23-330" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># with the color argument, I am giving</span></span>
<span id="cb23-331"><a href="#cb23-331" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="co"># states a grey outline!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-332"><a href="#cb23-332" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="at">fill =</span> <span class="cn">NA</span>, <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;grey30&quot;</span>, <span class="at">size =</span> <span class="fl">0.4</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-333"><a href="#cb23-333" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Projection</span></span>
<span id="cb23-334"><a href="#cb23-334" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">coord_map</span>(<span class="at">projection =</span> <span class="st">&quot;polyconic&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-335"><a href="#cb23-335" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-336"><a href="#cb23-336" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># purple seems like a bipartisan color?</span></span>
<span id="cb23-337"><a href="#cb23-337" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient</span>(<span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;plum&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-338"><a href="#cb23-338" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;mediumpurple4&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-339"><a href="#cb23-339" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">labels =</span> <span class="fu">percent_format</span>(<span class="at">accuracy =</span> 5L),</span>
<span id="cb23-340"><a href="#cb23-340" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="at">limits =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="fl">0.35</span>, <span class="fl">0.75</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-341"><a href="#cb23-341" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      </span>
<span id="cb23-342"><a href="#cb23-342" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># This blank &quot;&quot; means I do not want my </span></span>
<span id="cb23-343"><a href="#cb23-343" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="co"># legend to have a title.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-344"><a href="#cb23-344" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb23-345"><a href="#cb23-345" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-346"><a href="#cb23-346" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Theming</span></span>
<span id="cb23-347"><a href="#cb23-347" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme_minimal</span>(<span class="at">base_family =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light&quot;</span>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-348"><a href="#cb23-348" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb23-349"><a href="#cb23-349" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;right&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-350"><a href="#cb23-350" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">legend.text.align =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-351"><a href="#cb23-351" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">plot.margin =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">c</span>(.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>,.<span class="dv">2</span>,.<span class="dv">5</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-352"><a href="#cb23-352" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(</span>
<span id="cb23-353"><a href="#cb23-353" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-354"><a href="#cb23-354" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-355"><a href="#cb23-355" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.text.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-356"><a href="#cb23-356" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-357"><a href="#cb23-357" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-358"><a href="#cb23-358" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">axis.title.y =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-359"><a href="#cb23-359" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-360"><a href="#cb23-360" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">panel.grid.minor =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-361"><a href="#cb23-361" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">+</span> </span>
<span id="cb23-362"><a href="#cb23-362" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.title=</span><span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">family=</span><span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Bold&quot;</span>, <span class="at">margin=</span><span class="fu">margin</span>(<span class="at">b=</span><span class="dv">15</span>)))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-363"><a href="#cb23-363" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.subtitle=</span><span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">family=</span><span class="st">&quot;Open Sans Condensed Light Italic&quot;</span>))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-364"><a href="#cb23-364" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.margin=</span><span class="fu">unit</span>(<span class="fu">rep</span>(<span class="fl">0.5</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>), <span class="st">&quot;cm&quot;</span>))<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-365"><a href="#cb23-365" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-366"><a href="#cb23-366" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-367"><a href="#cb23-367" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;% of Respondents Contacted by a Political Campaign in 2020&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-368"><a href="#cb23-368" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Author: Pia Deshpande, Data: 2020 Cooperative Election Study&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-369"><a href="#cb23-369" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># The following code is adapted from the Urban Institute&#39;s Tutorial</span></span>
<span id="cb23-370"><a href="#cb23-370" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># https://urbaninstitute.github.io/r-at-urban/mapping.html#geom_tile()</span></span>
<span id="cb23-371"><a href="#cb23-371" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-372"><a href="#cb23-372" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># create a custom geofacet grid</span></span>
<span id="cb23-373"><a href="#cb23-373" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># This was constructed by the Urban Institute! I am using it here.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-374"><a href="#cb23-374" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># It tells R how to draw the grid, and how to name each square.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-375"><a href="#cb23-375" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I am grateful someone else wrote this and not me!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-376"><a href="#cb23-376" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-377"><a href="#cb23-377" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>urban_grid <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">tibble</span>(</span>
<span id="cb23-378"><a href="#cb23-378" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">row =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-379"><a href="#cb23-379" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-380"><a href="#cb23-380" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-381"><a href="#cb23-381" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">col =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">11</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>, <span class="dv">2</span>, <span class="dv">3</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">5</span>, <span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="dv">7</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>, <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">4</span>, <span class="dv">9</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-382"><a href="#cb23-382" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">code =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;AK&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ME&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;VT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NH&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ID&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ND&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IL&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OR&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;SD&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;IN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OH&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;PA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NJ&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;RI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;UT&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;CO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NE&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;KY&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;WV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;VA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MD&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DE&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AZ&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NM&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;KS&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AR&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;TN&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;SC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DC&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;OK&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;LA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;MS&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;AL&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;GA&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;HI&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;TX&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;FL&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-383"><a href="#cb23-383" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">name =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Alaska&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Maine&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Wisconsin&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Vermont&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Hampshire&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Washington&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Idaho&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Montana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;North Dakota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Minnesota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Illinois&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Michigan&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New York&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Massachusetts&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Oregon&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Nevada&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Wyoming&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;South Dakota&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Iowa&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Indiana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Ohio&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Pennsylvania&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Jersey&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Connecticut&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Rhode Island&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;California&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Utah&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Colorado&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Nebraska&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Missouri&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Kentucky&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;West Virginia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Virginia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Maryland&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Delaware&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Arizona&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;New Mexico&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Kansas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Arkansas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Tennessee&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot; North Carolina&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;South Carolina&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot; District of Columbia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Oklahoma&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Louisiana&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Mississippi&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Alabama&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Georgia&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Hawaii&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Texas&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Florida&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-384"><a href="#cb23-384" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb23-385"><a href="#cb23-385" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-386"><a href="#cb23-386" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-387"><a href="#cb23-387" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>contact_map <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-388"><a href="#cb23-388" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-389"><a href="#cb23-389" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># remember when I defined xdimension and ydimension a while ago?</span></span>
<span id="cb23-390"><a href="#cb23-390" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># It&#39;s coming in handy here!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-391"><a href="#cb23-391" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">ggplot</span>(<span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">x =</span> xdimension, <span class="at">y =</span> ydimension, <span class="at">fill =</span> contact)) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-392"><a href="#cb23-392" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-393"><a href="#cb23-393" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># We&#39;re making a tile map!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-394"><a href="#cb23-394" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_tile</span>() <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-395"><a href="#cb23-395" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-396"><a href="#cb23-396" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I am defining some display text here. I want</span></span>
<span id="cb23-397"><a href="#cb23-397" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># to print the value of &quot;contact,&quot; which is the </span></span>
<span id="cb23-398"><a href="#cb23-398" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># estimated percentage of Americans in a certain</span></span>
<span id="cb23-399"><a href="#cb23-399" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># state who were contacted by a political campaign!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-400"><a href="#cb23-400" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-401"><a href="#cb23-401" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># However, this number is a decimal. Another way</span></span>
<span id="cb23-402"><a href="#cb23-402" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># of formatting percentages is by multiplying them by 100</span></span>
<span id="cb23-403"><a href="#cb23-403" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># and using the round function (I wanted no decimal places).</span></span>
<span id="cb23-404"><a href="#cb23-404" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I then use the paste0 function to add a pretty percentage sign!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-405"><a href="#cb23-405" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">geom_text</span>(<span class="fu">aes</span>(<span class="at">label =</span> <span class="fu">paste0</span>(<span class="fu">round</span>(contact<span class="sc">*</span><span class="dv">100</span>,<span class="dv">0</span>), <span class="st">&quot;%&quot;</span>)),</span>
<span id="cb23-406"><a href="#cb23-406" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            </span>
<span id="cb23-407"><a href="#cb23-407" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="co"># this makes the text white!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-408"><a href="#cb23-408" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="at">color =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-409"><a href="#cb23-409" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-410"><a href="#cb23-410" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Using our grid from before. Thanks again to the Urban Institute!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-411"><a href="#cb23-411" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># I also want to facet by state_abbv (That is, make a new tile) for</span></span>
<span id="cb23-412"><a href="#cb23-412" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># each state abbreviation.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-413"><a href="#cb23-413" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">facet_geo</span>(<span class="at">facets =</span> <span class="sc">~</span>state_abbv, <span class="at">grid =</span> urban_grid) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-414"><a href="#cb23-414" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">labs</span>(<span class="at">title =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Percentage of Americans Contacted by a Political Campaign in 2020&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-415"><a href="#cb23-415" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">subtitle =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Adapted from Code from the Urban Institute&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-416"><a href="#cb23-416" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">caption =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Graph by Pia Deshpande </span><span class="sc">\n</span><span class="st"> Data from the 2020 CES&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-417"><a href="#cb23-417" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">x =</span> <span class="cn">NULL</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-418"><a href="#cb23-418" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="at">y =</span> <span class="cn">NULL</span>) <span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-419"><a href="#cb23-419" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">scale_fill_gradient</span>(</span>
<span id="cb23-420"><a href="#cb23-420" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb23-421"><a href="#cb23-421" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># Purple all the way down!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-422"><a href="#cb23-422" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">low =</span> <span class="st">&quot;plum&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-423"><a href="#cb23-423" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">high =</span> <span class="st">&quot;mediumpurple4&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-424"><a href="#cb23-424" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-425"><a href="#cb23-425" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># No legend title please</span></span>
<span id="cb23-426"><a href="#cb23-426" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb23-427"><a href="#cb23-427" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)<span class="sc">+</span></span>
<span id="cb23-428"><a href="#cb23-428" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">theme</span>(<span class="at">plot.background =</span> <span class="fu">element_rect</span>(<span class="at">colour =</span> <span class="st">&quot;white&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-429"><a href="#cb23-429" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.grid =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-430"><a href="#cb23-430" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.grid.major =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-431"><a href="#cb23-431" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.text =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-432"><a href="#cb23-432" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.ticks =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-433"><a href="#cb23-433" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">axis.line =</span> <span class="fu">element_blank</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb23-434"><a href="#cb23-434" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">panel.spacing =</span> <span class="fu">unit</span>(0L, <span class="st">&quot;pt&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb23-435"><a href="#cb23-435" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">legend.position =</span> <span class="st">&quot;none&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-436"><a href="#cb23-436" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="at">strip.text.x =</span> <span class="fu">element_text</span>(<span class="at">size =</span> 9L))</span>
<span id="cb23-437"><a href="#cb23-437" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-438"><a href="#cb23-438" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Code taken from: https://rstudio.github.io/leaflet/basemaps.html</span></span>
<span id="cb23-439"><a href="#cb23-439" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># An excellent official leaflet tutorial!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-440"><a href="#cb23-440" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-441"><a href="#cb23-441" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">leaflet</span>(states) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-442"><a href="#cb23-442" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># This tells leaflet to pull from its states library</span></span>
<span id="cb23-443"><a href="#cb23-443" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-444"><a href="#cb23-444" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">setView</span>(<span class="at">lng =</span> <span class="sc">-</span><span class="dv">71</span>, <span class="at">lat =</span> <span class="dv">43</span>, <span class="at">zoom =</span> <span class="dv">8</span>) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span> </span>
<span id="cb23-445"><a href="#cb23-445" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># This gives it a desired longitude and latitude and zoom level</span></span>
<span id="cb23-446"><a href="#cb23-446" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># zoom = 12 is way more zoomed in than zoom = 2 (that is,</span></span>
<span id="cb23-447"><a href="#cb23-447" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># larger numbers mean our map will be more zoomed in).</span></span>
<span id="cb23-448"><a href="#cb23-448" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb23-449"><a href="#cb23-449" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addTiles</span>() <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-450"><a href="#cb23-450" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addProviderTiles</span>(providers<span class="sc">$</span>CartoDB.Positron) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span> <span class="co"># add muted palette basemap</span></span>
<span id="cb23-451"><a href="#cb23-451" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">saveWidget</span>(<span class="st">&quot;baseleaflet.html&quot;</span>) <span class="co"># save map widget</span></span>
<span id="cb23-452"><a href="#cb23-452" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                 <span class="co"># this step is only important to </span></span>
<span id="cb23-453"><a href="#cb23-453" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                 <span class="co"># helping us render this map on the web</span></span>
<span id="cb23-454"><a href="#cb23-454" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-455"><a href="#cb23-455" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Get the data here: https://github.com/minh5/wafflehouse/blob/master/webscraping/geoWaffles.csv</span></span>
<span id="cb23-456"><a href="#cb23-456" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># The Waffle House data has not been updated since 2015, unfortunately :(</span></span>
<span id="cb23-457"><a href="#cb23-457" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-458"><a href="#cb23-458" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>waffle <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">read.csv</span>(<span class="fu">here</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Data/geoWaffles.csv&quot;</span>))</span>
<span id="cb23-459"><a href="#cb23-459" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># I am using the here() package to load this csv in with a relative file path.</span></span>
<span id="cb23-460"><a href="#cb23-460" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># If this is new to you, feel free to load in the data using an absolute</span></span>
<span id="cb23-461"><a href="#cb23-461" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># file path (however you would normally load in data), but I would</span></span>
<span id="cb23-462"><a href="#cb23-462" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># suggest looking into here() and using project structure in the future!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-463"><a href="#cb23-463" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-464"><a href="#cb23-464" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># https://learn.r-journalism.com/en/mapping/leaflet_maps/leaflet/</span></span>
<span id="cb23-465"><a href="#cb23-465" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-466"><a href="#cb23-466" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">leaflet</span>(waffle) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-467"><a href="#cb23-467" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co"># We are telling leaflet to use the waffle dataframe</span></span>
<span id="cb23-468"><a href="#cb23-468" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-469"><a href="#cb23-469" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addCircles</span>(<span class="sc">~</span>lngs,</span>
<span id="cb23-470"><a href="#cb23-470" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># the longitude column</span></span>
<span id="cb23-471"><a href="#cb23-471" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb23-472"><a href="#cb23-472" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="sc">~</span>lats, </span>
<span id="cb23-473"><a href="#cb23-473" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># the latitude column</span></span>
<span id="cb23-474"><a href="#cb23-474" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb23-475"><a href="#cb23-475" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">weight =</span> <span class="dv">3</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-476"><a href="#cb23-476" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">radius=</span><span class="dv">40</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-477"><a href="#cb23-477" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># how big do we want our circles to be?</span></span>
<span id="cb23-478"><a href="#cb23-478" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">color=</span><span class="st">&quot;#ffa500&quot;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb23-479"><a href="#cb23-479" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># what color do we want them to be?</span></span>
<span id="cb23-480"><a href="#cb23-480" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb23-481"><a href="#cb23-481" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">stroke =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>,</span>
<span id="cb23-482"><a href="#cb23-482" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># try changing this to</span></span>
<span id="cb23-483"><a href="#cb23-483" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># stroke = FALSE and seeing</span></span>
<span id="cb23-484"><a href="#cb23-484" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># what happens!</span></span>
<span id="cb23-485"><a href="#cb23-485" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             </span>
<span id="cb23-486"><a href="#cb23-486" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="at">fillOpacity =</span> <span class="fl">0.8</span>)  <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-487"><a href="#cb23-487" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># how transparent? </span></span>
<span id="cb23-488"><a href="#cb23-488" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># fillOpacity = 1 is opaque, </span></span>
<span id="cb23-489"><a href="#cb23-489" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="co"># while fillOpacity = 0 is completely transparent</span></span>
<span id="cb23-490"><a href="#cb23-490" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addTiles</span>() <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span></span>
<span id="cb23-491"><a href="#cb23-491" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">addProviderTiles</span>(providers<span class="sc">$</span>CartoDB.Positron) <span class="sc">%&gt;%</span> <span class="co"># add muted palette basemap</span></span>
<span id="cb23-492"><a href="#cb23-492" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">saveWidget</span>(here<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">here</span>(<span class="st">&quot;waffle.html&quot;</span>)) <span class="co"># save map widget</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>




</div>

<script>

// add bootstrap table styles to pandoc tables
function bootstrapStylePandocTables() {
  $('tr.odd').parent('tbody').parent('table').addClass('table table-condensed');
}
$(document).ready(function () {
  bootstrapStylePandocTables();
});


</script>

<!-- tabsets -->

<script>
$(document).ready(function () {
  window.buildTabsets("TOC");
});

$(document).ready(function () {
  $('.tabset-dropdown > .nav-tabs > li').click(function () {
    $(this).parent().toggleClass('nav-tabs-open');
  });
});
</script>

<!-- code folding -->


<!-- dynamically load mathjax for compatibility with self-contained -->
<script>
  (function () {
    var script = document.createElement("script");
    script.type = "text/javascript";
    script.src  = "https://mathjax.rstudio.com/latest/MathJax.js?config=TeX-AMS-MML_HTMLorMML";
    document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0].appendChild(script);
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
